title: IVA Music Academy
description: Designed and developed a 48-page website for IVA Music Academy — a premium music education platform featuring courses, faculty profiles, founder story, and a 31-image gallery.
longDescription:
Designed and developed the complete website for IVA Music Academy, a professional music education platform offering instrumental courses and structured training programs.

Built entirely in Framer, the site features a sleek dark theme with striking cyan and electric blue accents, blur-based depth effects, and smooth animations. The project spans 48 pages including the homepage, about page, instrumental music courses, a faculty section with individual profile pages for 4 instructors, founder's story, music education goals, a contact page, and a rich gallery section with 31 individually showcased images — all designed to establish IVA Music as a premium, modern music institution.
highlights: 48-page production website built entirely in Framer
Instrumental music courses page with structured listings
Faculty section with 4 individual instructor profiles
Founder story & music education goals pages
Dark theme with cyan neon accents & blur effects
